---
pagetitle: "Steve Haigh · Computational Biology"
page-layout: custom
toc: false
lightbox: false
listing:
  - id: latest-post
    contents: blog/posts
    sort: "date desc"
    max-items: 1
    template: partials/latest-post.ejs
    date-format: "YYYY-MM-DD"
    fields: [date, title, description, categories, path]
include-in-header:
  - text: |
      <style>
        /* Homepage-only: the warm "paper" background for the showcase layout,
           and a full-width content area (the shared navbar supplies the header).
           The footer is hidden here — the page ends on its own easter-egg line.
           Scoped to index.qmd only. */
        body { background: #f2f1ea; }
        [data-bs-theme="dark"] body { background: #16181b; }
        /* Blend the shared navbar with the homepage's warm paper (html prefix
           out-specifies the global .navbar rule in styles.css) */
        html .navbar { background: #f2f1ea !important; }
        html[data-bs-theme="dark"] .navbar { background: #16181b !important; }
        .nav-footer, footer.footer { display: none !important; }
        #quarto-content, main.content, .page-columns, .content {
          max-width: none !important;
          padding: 0 !important;
          margin: 0 !important;
          gap: 0 !important;
          grid-template-columns: none !important;
          display: block !important;
        }
      </style>
---

```{=html}
<div class="nb">
  <div class="nb-body">
    <div class="nb-rail">
      <img src="img/profile.jpg" alt="Steve Haigh" class="nb-photo">
      <div class="nb-k">NAME</div><div class="nb-v">Steve Haigh</div>
      <div class="nb-k">ROLE</div><div class="nb-v">Comp-bio researcher</div>
      <div class="nb-k">LAB</div><div class="nb-v">Univ. Reading · Dr M. Fry</div>
      <div class="nb-k">MODEL</div><div class="nb-v">human platelet / wcEcoli</div>
      <div class="nb-k">STATUS</div>
      <div class="nb-v nb-status"><span class="nb-dot"></span>writing dissertation</div>
      <div class="nb-k">LINKS</div>
      <div class="nb-links">
        <a href="https://github.com/stevehaigh">→ github</a>
        <a href="https://linkedin.com/in/shaigh">→ linkedin</a>
        <a href="#email">→ email</a>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="nb-main">
      <div class="nb-eyebrow">§ index</div>
      <h1 class="nb-name">Steve Haigh</h1>
      <p class="nb-tagline">Computational biology, viewed from a 30-year software career.</p>
      <p class="nb-intro">Software developer of 30 years, now researching biomedical sciences at the University of Reading — extending the <em>wcEcoli</em> whole-cell framework to the first computational model of a human platelet.</p>

      <figure class="nb-fig">
        <img src="assets/integrin-activation.png" alt="Two stacked line charts from a platelet simulation run over 600 seconds. Top chart: the share of activated integrin receptors — the sticky surface molecules platelets use to clump together and form clots — holds near zero for about 300 seconds, then climbs steeply in an S-shaped curve to a high, steady level; a grey reference line settles slightly higher than the purple main line, and a faint dotted line traces a smaller, short-lived trigger signal that rises then fades. Bottom chart: a molecular brake that normally dampens activation stays flat at its resting level, then temporarily swells to a peak around the 370-second mark before easing back down, plotted against a flat baseline for comparison.">
        <figcaption>Fig. 1 — Integrin αIIbβ3 activation and its cAMP/PKA brake. <span class="nb-figmeta">plot: demo_integrin.py · seed 0 · 600 s</span></figcaption>
      </figure>

      <div class="nb-sec">
        <span class="nb-sec-num">§01</span>
        <span class="nb-sec-label">Current focus</span>
        <div class="nb-sec-rule"></div>
      </div>
      <div class="nb-row">
        <div class="nb-key">whole_cell_model</div>
        <p>Extending <em>wcEcoli</em> to build the first computational model of a human platelet.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="nb-row">
        <div class="nb-key">sim_infra</div>
        <p>Containerised pipelines and interactive browser-based UIs for high-dimensional output.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="nb-row">
        <div class="nb-key">eng_x_bio</div>
        <p>Software-engineering discipline brought to computational-biology workflows.</p>
      </div>

      <div class="nb-sec">
        <span class="nb-sec-num">§02</span>
        <span class="nb-sec-label">Now — updated Jun 2026</span>
        <div class="nb-sec-rule"></div>
      </div>
      <p class="nb-now">Starting on a draft of my dissertation… which means work avoidance and too much time playing with this site. When I focus, I'm finalising figures and weighing whether to add more biology to the model before calling it done.</p>

      <div class="nb-sec">
        <span class="nb-sec-num">§03</span>
        <span class="nb-sec-label">Latest post</span>
        <div class="nb-sec-rule"></div>
      </div>
```

::: {#latest-post}
:::

```{=html}
      <div class="nb-egg">
        <a href="/life/" aria-label="A small surprise">$ cd ~/life<svg class="nb-glider" width="15" height="15" viewBox="0 0 16 16" aria-hidden="true"><g class="nb-gp"><rect x="6" y="1" width="4" height="4"/><rect x="11" y="6" width="4" height="4"/><rect x="1" y="11" width="4" height="4"/><rect x="6" y="11" width="4" height="4"/><rect x="11" y="11" width="4" height="4"/></g><g class="nb-gp"><rect x="1" y="1" width="4" height="4"/><rect x="11" y="1" width="4" height="4"/><rect x="6" y="6" width="4" height="4"/><rect x="11" y="6" width="4" height="4"/><rect x="6" y="11" width="4" height="4"/></g><g class="nb-gp"><rect x="11" y="1" width="4" height="4"/><rect x="1" y="6" width="4" height="4"/><rect x="11" y="6" width="4" height="4"/><rect x="6" y="11" width="4" height="4"/><rect x="11" y="11" width="4" height="4"/></g><g class="nb-gp"><rect x="1" y="1" width="4" height="4"/><rect x="6" y="6" width="4" height="4"/><rect x="11" y="6" width="4" height="4"/><rect x="1" y="11" width="4" height="4"/><rect x="6" y="11" width="4" height="4"/></g></svg></a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```
